archive/tar::NewReader: Audited 2026-06-02: reader behavior roots generic gaps in mutable []byte lvalue arguments, nullable pointer comparisons, FnMut closure captures, and sync/atomic lowering.
archive/tar::NewWriter: Audited 2026-06-02: writer behavior still needs generic io.Writer mutation, []byte lvalue writes, and archive reader/writer control-flow lowering.
archive/tar::Reader: Audited 2026-06-02: reader behavior roots generic gaps in mutable []byte lvalue arguments, nullable pointer comparisons, FnMut closure captures, and sync/atomic lowering.
archive/tar::Reader.Next: Audited 2026-06-02: Next roots mutable slice/interface Read lowering, nullable pointer equality, labeled-block continue, and default-type inference gaps.
archive/tar::Reader.Read: Audited 2026-06-02: Read needs generic mutation-preserving []byte lvalue arguments for io.Reader implementations.
archive/tar::Writer: Audited 2026-06-02: writer behavior still needs generic io.Writer mutation, []byte lvalue writes, and archive reader/writer control-flow lowering.
archive/tar::Writer.AddFS: Audited 2026-06-02: AddFS depends on the unsupported archive/tar writer path plus fs traversal/write behavior.
archive/tar::Writer.Close: Audited 2026-06-02: Close depends on the unsupported archive/tar writer path.
archive/tar::Writer.Flush: Audited 2026-06-02: Flush depends on the unsupported archive/tar writer path.
archive/tar::Writer.Write: Audited 2026-06-02: Write needs generic mutation-preserving []byte lvalue arguments for io.Writer implementations.
archive/tar::Writer.WriteHeader: Audited 2026-06-02: WriteHeader depends on generic io.Writer mutation, []byte lvalue writes, and archive header encoding control-flow lowering.
archive/zip::Compressor: Audited 2026-06-02: compressor registry behavior depends on named function-type values stored in maps and invoked through io.Writer interfaces.
archive/zip::Decompressor: Audited 2026-06-02: decompressor registry behavior depends on named function-type values stored in maps and invoked through io.Reader interfaces.
archive/zip::File: Audited 2026-06-02: zip file behavior depends on generic io.ReaderAt/SectionReader lowering, decompressor function values, checksum readers, and archive byte parsing.
archive/zip::File.DataOffset: Audited 2026-06-02: DataOffset depends on generic archive byte parsing over io.ReaderAt/SectionReader state.
archive/zip::File.Open: Audited 2026-06-02: Open depends on generic io.ReaderAt/SectionReader lowering, decompressor function values, and checksum reader interface behavior.
archive/zip::File.OpenRaw: Audited 2026-06-02: OpenRaw depends on generic io.ReaderAt/SectionReader lowering for compressed archive entry data.
archive/zip::FileHeader.FileInfo: Audited 2026-06-02: FileInfo depends on generic fs.FileInfo interface values, time.Time conversion, and mode metadata lowering.
archive/zip::FileHeader.ModTime: Audited 2026-06-02: ModTime depends on generic time.Time and MS-DOS timestamp conversion lowering.
archive/zip::FileHeader.Mode: Audited 2026-06-02: Mode depends on generic fs.FileMode conversion from external archive attributes.
archive/zip::FileHeader.SetModTime: Audited 2026-06-02: SetModTime depends on generic time.Time and MS-DOS timestamp conversion lowering.
archive/zip::FileInfoHeader: Audited 2026-06-02: FileInfoHeader depends on generic fs.FileInfo interface calls, time.Time conversion, and mode metadata lowering.

archive/zip::NewWriter: Audited 2026-06-02: NewWriter depends on generic io.Writer mutation, bufio.Writer state, pointer-field archive writer state, and compressor registry behavior.
